Helijet Charters : Sikorsky S76

From Helijet’s Hanger at YVR-Richmond, and operating at terminals in Vancouver Harbour, Victoria Harbour and Nanaimo Harbour as well as seasonal bases at Haida Gwaii-Sandspit and Prince Rupert-Seal Cove, our fleet of Sikorsky S76 helicopters plus our IFR-trained pilots will get you where you need to be throughout British Columbia.

For additional information on helicopter charters or a quotation please contact us at: charters[at]helijet.it.com or call 1-800-987-4354 (between 6 a.m. and 7 p.m. Sikorsky S76A

Available payloads may vary slightly based on aircraft availability

  • Passengers – 12
  • Cabin Volume – 204 cu ft
  • Baggage Volume – 38 cu ft
  • Baggage Length – 2.9ft
  • Baggage Width – 5.8ft
  • Baggage Height – 2.25ft
  • Payload (w/full fuel) – 1333lbs
  • Payload (w/one hour fuel) – 2503lbs
  • Nominal Sling Load – N/A
  • Cruise Speed – 135kts
  • Max Range (w/Full Fuel) – 369nm
  • Fuel Capacity – 1840lbs
  • Endurance – 2.9 hours
  • Fuel Consumption – 600lbs per hour
